data.name: Ledyba
data.flavor_text: When the weather turns cold, lots of Ledyba gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.

data.name: Ledian
data.flavor_text: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

data.name: Celebi
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon has the ability to move through time. Records describing it as a forest deity can be found from many different eras.

data.name: Lileep
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. Lileep once lived in warm seas that existed approximately 100,000,000 years ago.

data.name: Cradily
data.flavor_text: It has short legs and can't walk very fast, but its neck and tentacles can extend to over three times their usual length to nab distant prey.

data.name: Carnivine
data.flavor_text: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

data.name: Mow Rotom
data.flavor_text: This Rotom has possessed a lawn mower. It will mow down grass and flowers, then swagger around with pride at its accomplishments.

data.name: Grubbin
data.flavor_text: It spits sticky threads and winds them around branches, then swings nimbly from tree to tree in a pendulum-like motion.

data.name: Gossifleur
data.flavor_text: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.

data.name: Eldegoss
data.flavor_text: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.

data.name: Applin
data.flavor_text: Applin lives inside an apple. When an Applin is separated from its apple, its body loses moisture and the Pokémon grows weak.

data.name: Nymble
data.flavor_text: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it's in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

data.name: Lokix
data.flavor_text: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.

data.name: Toedscool
data.flavor_text: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

data.name: Toedscruel
data.flavor_text: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

data.name: Ponyta
data.flavor_text: Its legs grow strong while it chases after its parent. It runs in fields and mountains all day.

data.name: Rapidash
data.flavor_text: It gallops at nearly 150 mph. With its mane blazing ferociously, it races as if it were an arrow.

data.name: Pansear
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

data.name: Reshiram
data.flavor_text: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with fire. It helps those who want to build a world of truth.

data.name: Salandit
data.flavor_text: Only female Salandit can produce gas laden with pheromones. Males entranced by this gas will do whatever the females tell them.

data.name: Salazzle
data.flavor_text: When two Salazzle meet, they will use their pheromone gas to fight over the males in each other's group.

data.name: Turtonator
data.flavor_text: Explosive substances coat the shell on its back. Enemies that dare attack it will be blown away by an immense detonation.

data.name: Scorbunny
data.flavor_text: Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet, raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny's footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

data.name: Raboot
data.flavor_text: While it prides itself on its varied kicking moves, it can also deliver powerful headbutts once its flames have heated up its forehead.

data.name: Charcadet
data.flavor_text: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

data.name: Lapras
data.flavor_text: It loves crossing the sea with people and Pokémon on its back. It understands human speech.

data.name: Marill
data.flavor_text: The oil-filled end of its tail floats on water. It keeps Marill from drowning even in a strong current.

data.name: Azumarill
data.flavor_text: Its long ears are superb sensors. It can distinguish the movements of living things on riverbeds.

data.name: Finneon
data.flavor_text: It absorbs sunlight with the pink areas of its skin, which then shine. This appears to be a form of camouflage.

data.name: Lumineon
data.flavor_text: Lumineon swimming in the darkness of the deep sea look like stars shining in the night sky.

data.name: Tirtouga
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon inhabited ancient seas. Although it can only crawl, it still comes up onto land in search of prey.

data.name: Carracosta
data.flavor_text: Carracosta completely devours its prey—bones, shells, and all. Because of this, Carracosta's own shell grows thick and sturdy.

data.name: Froakie
data.flavor_text: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

data.name: Frogadier
data.flavor_text: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

data.name: Crabominable
data.flavor_text: Though its punches are powerful, this Pokémon's movements are sluggish. It blows icy bubbles from its mouth to immobilize its opponents.

data.name: Chewtle
data.flavor_text: A popular game among children is to lift up sticks that Chewtle have bitten onto to see whose Chewtle can hang on the longest.

data.name: Drednaw
data.flavor_text: Drednaw lurks along the shoreline. When prey come to drink water, Drednaw stretches its neck out and chomps down on them.

data.name: Veluza
data.flavor_text: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

data.name: Electabuzz
data.flavor_text: Research is progressing on storing lightning in Electabuzz so this energy can be used at any time.

data.name: Electivire
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon presses the tips of its tails onto an opponent and instantly sends over 20,000 volts of high-voltage electricity through them.

data.name: Chinchou
data.flavor_text: It shoots positively and negatively charged electricity from the tips of its two antennae and stuns its opponents.

data.name: Lanturn
data.flavor_text: It blinds prey with an intense burst of light. With the prey incapacitated, the Pokémon swallows it in a single gulp.

data.name: Joltik
data.flavor_text: Since it can't generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity.

data.name: Charjabug
data.flavor_text: As it digests fallen leaves, it generates and stores electricity, which it can discharge from the tips of its jaws.

data.name: Vikavolt
data.flavor_text: When carrying a Charjabug, Vikavolt can receive electricity from it and then rapidly fire powerful electromagnetic beams from its large jaws.

data.name: Togedemaru
data.flavor_text: With the long hairs on its back, this Pokémon takes in electricity from other electric Pokémon. It stores what it absorbs in an electric sac.

data.name: Zeraora
data.flavor_text: It runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws.

data.name: Pawmi
data.flavor_text: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

data.name: Slowpoke
data.flavor_text: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

data.name: Slowking
data.flavor_text: It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

data.name: Mewtwo
data.flavor_text: A Pokémon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among Pokémon.

data.name: Drifloon
data.flavor_text: Because of the way it floats aimlessly, an old folktale calls it a “signpost for wandering spirits.”

data.name: Drifblim
data.flavor_text: They carry people and Pokémon, but the wind can catch them, so there can't be a fixed destination.

data.name: Yamask
data.flavor_text: The spirit of a person from a bygone age became this Pokémon. It rambles through ruins, searching for someone who knows its face.

data.name: Comfey
data.flavor_text: It prefers areas with lots of flowers. A Comfey adorned with flowers is a happy Comfey, and the flowers gain healing effects.

data.name: Milcery
data.flavor_text: When attacked, it tackles its foe and covers them in cream. With its foe either blinded or astonished by deliciousness, Milcery flees.

data.name: Alcremie
data.flavor_text: Alcremie that have been cherished produce exquisite cream, so Trainers always raise them lovingly.

data.name: Fidough
data.flavor_text: The yeast in Fidough's breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

data.name: Flittle
data.flavor_text: Flittle's toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon's belly.

data.name: Espathra
data.flavor_text: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.

data.name: Greavard
data.flavor_text: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

data.name: Iron Boulder
data.flavor_text: It was named after a mysterious object recorded in an old book. Its body seems to be metallic.

data.name: Cubone
data.flavor_text: When the memory of its departed mother brings it to tears, its cries echo mournfully within the skull it wears on its head.

data.name: Marowak
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon overcame its sorrow to evolve a sturdy new body. Marowak faces its opponents bravely, using a bone as a weapon.

data.name: Rhyhorn
data.flavor_text: Once it starts running, it won't stop—even if it crashes through boulders. This disposition is what's caused its habitat to expand.

data.name: Rhydon
data.flavor_text: It evolved to walk using only its hind legs, which has allowed it to expand its habitat even onto steep mountains.

data.name: Rhyperior
data.flavor_text: A Rhyperior's brain is smaller than a Rhydon's, but the Rhyperior is stronger because it spends more energy on battling and less on brainpower.

data.name: Meditite
data.flavor_text: It never skips its daily yoga training. It heightens its inner strength through meditation.

data.name: Meditite
data.flavor_text: It meditates to heighten its inner energy and to float in the air. It eats one berry a day.

data.name: Medicham
data.flavor_text: It elegantly avoids attacks with dance-like steps, then launches a devastating blow in the same motion.

data.name: Riolu
data.flavor_text: It has the peculiar power of being able to see emotions, such as joy and rage, in the form of waves.

data.name: Mienfoo
data.flavor_text: They seclude themselves in the mountains and devote themselves to training. The form of their kicks and chops differs from pack to pack.

data.name: Mienshao
data.flavor_text: Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it launches into combo attacks that, once started, no one can stop.

data.name: Pancham
data.flavor_text: It chooses a Pangoro as its master and then imitates its master's actions. This is how it learns to battle and hunt for prey.

data.name: Diancie
data.flavor_text: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

data.name: Crabrawler
data.flavor_text: If it loses its pincers, they'll quickly regrow. The pincers are popular ingredients in paella since their shells produce a tasty soup stock.

data.name: Falinks
data.flavor_text: The leader, known as the brass, uses its extendible horn to issue orders to the others when it's time to change formation.

data.name: Koraidon
data.flavor_text: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.

data.name: Gulpin
data.flavor_text: It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything.

data.name: Swalot
data.flavor_text: It can swallow a tire whole in one gulp. It secretes a horribly toxic fluid from the pores on its body.

data.name: Pangoro
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon is quick to anger, and it has no problem using its prodigious strength to get its way. It lives for duels against Obstagoon.

data.name: Impidimp
data.flavor_text: They live in groups, pestering and playing pranks on each other to polish their troublemaking skills.

data.name: Morgrem
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon absorbs negative emotions and turns them into energy. It's popular with people who tend to think gloomy thoughts.

data.name: Grimmsnarl
data.flavor_text: It lives deep within the forest. Even after evolving into this splendid form, it hasn't given up on its petty misdeeds and pranks.

data.name: Bombirdier
data.flavor_text: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

data.name: Jirachi
data.flavor_text: It is said to have the ability to grant any wish for just one week every thousand years.

data.name: Klink
data.flavor_text: The two minigears that compose this Pokémon are closer than twins. They mesh well only with each other.

data.name: Klang
data.flavor_text: When Klang goes all out, the minigear links up perfectly with the outer part of the big gear, and this Pokémon's rotation speed increases sharply.

data.name: Klinklang
data.flavor_text: From its spikes, it launches powerful blasts of electricity. Its red core contains an enormous amount of energy.

data.name: Meltan
data.flavor_text: It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

data.name: Meltan
data.flavor_text: It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

data.name: Melmetal
data.flavor_text: At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.

data.name: Duraludon
data.flavor_text: Its metal body is durable but prone to retaining heat. It vents this heat from the slits in its tail.

data.name: Archaludon
data.flavor_text: It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It's so durable that being caught in a cave-in won't faze it.

data.name: Varoom
data.flavor_text: The steel section is Varoom's actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

data.name: Revavroom
data.flavor_text: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

data.name: Raging Bolt
data.flavor_text: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.

data.name: Tauros
data.flavor_text: A rowdy Pokémon with a lot of stamina. Once running, it won't stop until it hits something.

data.name: Eevee
data.flavor_text: It can evolve into a variety of forms. Eevee's genes are the key to solving the mysteries of Pokémon evolution.

data.name: Hoothoot
data.flavor_text: Since it tells time precisely, some countries consider it to be a deity of wisdom, versed in the ways of the world.

data.name: Noctowl
data.flavor_text: Its extremely soft wings make no sound in flight. It silently sneaks up on prey without being detected.

data.name: Glameow
data.flavor_text: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

data.name: Purugly
data.flavor_text: It would claim another Pokémon's nest as its own if it finds a nest sufficiently comfortable.

data.name: Fan Rotom
data.flavor_text: There are several appliances that Rotom can inspirit, but the first one to be developed was the electric fan.

data.name: Bouffalant
data.flavor_text: These Pokémon can crush a car with no more than a headbutt. Bouffalant with more hair on their heads hold higher positions within the herd.

data.name: Tornadus
data.flavor_text: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

data.name: Fletchling
data.flavor_text: Fletchling can be found in both rural and urban areas. They once had a huge territorial dispute with Squawkabilly. Fights broke out all over town.

data.name: Fletchinder
data.flavor_text: Its territory has a radius of just over a mile. If any bird Pokémon should enter, it will show them no mercy.

data.name: Talonflame
data.flavor_text: When it gets excited, it vents sparks from the gaps between its feathers. These unburnable feathers are used as a fireproof material.

data.name: Wooloo
data.flavor_text: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

data.name: Dubwool
data.flavor_text: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You'll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.

data.name: Lechonk
data.flavor_text: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn't use it for anything other than foraging.

data.name: Cyclizar
data.flavor_text: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider's body heat warms Cyclizar's back and lifts the Pokémon's spirit.

data.name: Bulbasaur
data.flavor_text: While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seed on its back in order to grow.

data.name: Ledian
data.flavor_text: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

data.name: Lileep
data.flavor_text: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. Lileep once lived in warm seas that existed approximately 100,000,000 years ago.

data.name: Turtonator
data.flavor_text: Explosive substances coat the shell on its back. Enemies that dare attack it will be blown away by an immense detonation.

data.name: Raboot
data.flavor_text: While it prides itself on its varied kicking moves, it can also deliver powerful headbutts once its flames have heated up its forehead.

data.name: Squirtle
data.flavor_text: When it feels threatened, it draws its limbs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.

data.name: Crabominable
data.flavor_text: Though its punches are powerful, this Pokémon's movements are sluggish. It blows icy bubbles from its mouth to immobilize its opponents.

data.name: Joltik
data.flavor_text: Since it can't generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity.

data.name: Zeraora
data.flavor_text: It runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws.

data.name: Milcery
data.flavor_text: When attacked, it tackles its foe and covers them in cream. With its foe either blinded or astonished by deliciousness, Milcery flees.

data.name: Meditite
data.flavor_text: It meditates to heighten its inner energy and to float in the air. It eats one berry a day.

data.name: Gulpin
data.flavor_text: It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything.

data.name: Archaludon
data.flavor_text: It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It's so durable that being caught in a cave-in won't faze it.
